alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds containing a thioether group that is substituted by two aryl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Diarylthioethers

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the dialkyl ether functional group, with the formula ROR', where R and R' are aryl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Diarylethers

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an oxathiin moiety, which consists of an unsaturated aliphatic six-member ring with one oxygen atom, a sulfur atom, and four carbon atoms. Isomers  of oxaphospholane include 1,2-oxathiin, 1,3-oxathiin,and 1,4-oxathiin.
alternative_parents.name: Oxathiins

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenoids

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one oxygen atom linked to a ring carbon.
alternative_parents.name: Oxacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a benzene fused to an oxathiin ring (a six-membered aliphatic ring with four carbon atoms, one oxygen atom, and one sulfur atom).
class.name: Benzoxathiins

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as phenoxathiins. These are polycyclic aromatic compounds containing a phenoxathiin moiety, which is a linear tricyclic system that consists of a two benzene rings joined by a 1,4-oxathiin ring.

direct_parent.description: Polycyclic aromatic compounds containing a phenoxathiin moiety, which is a linear tricyclic system that consists of a two benzene rings joined by a 1,4-oxathiin ring.
direct_parent.name: Phenoxathiins

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Polycyclic aromatic compounds containing a phenoxathiin moiety, which is a linear tricyclic system that consists of a two benzene rings joined by a 1,4-oxathiin ring.
subclass.name: Phenoxathiins

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
